templates: {name} has practiced at {business} for {years} years. Half the town has been healed by {pronoun_obj} at some point; the other half is just waiting their turn. {personality_line} {hook}
People come to {name} when the church can't help and they can't afford to wait. {pronoun_cap} doesn't advertise. {personality_line} {hook}
{name} learned the trade {origin}. {pronoun_cap} settled in {town} when {pronoun} found what {pronoun} was looking for — or stopped running from it. {personality_line} {hook}
origins: from a grandmother who never wrote anything down
through years of study in a city apothecary
following an old healer across three countries
out of necessity, when there was no one else to do it
from books that aren't in any common library

personality_lines.curious: {pronoun_cap} is always drying something new from the fields, and not everything is strictly medicinal.
personality_lines.cautious: {pronoun_cap} will not give a remedy without knowing the full history first.
personality_lines.patient: {pronoun_cap} has sat with the dying when there was nothing else to offer. {pronoun_cap} does not consider it wasted time.
personality_lines.pious: {pronoun_cap} believes the body and the spirit are not easily separated, and treats accordingly.
personality_lines.cynical: {pronoun_cap} has seen enough 'miracle cures' to be skeptical of anything that promises too much.
personality_lines.brave: {pronoun_cap} has walked into plague houses when others refused.
personality_lines.melancholy: There are remedies {pronoun} knows that {pronoun} will not make, and {pronoun} doesn't explain why.
personality_lines.generous: The poor pay what they can. Children pay nothing.
personality_lines.suspicious: {pronoun_cap} is careful who {pronoun} sells certain preparations to.
personality_lines.ambitious: {pronoun_cap} is writing everything down. Someday it will be worth something.

hooks: Something is making the livestock ill on the edge of town. {pronoun_cap} has a theory, but it's one {pronoun} hopes is wrong.
{pronoun_cap} was visited recently by someone who knew things about {pronoun_obj} that {pronoun} thought were forgotten.
A remedy that shouldn't have failed — did. {pronoun_cap} has been trying to understand it for weeks.
{pronoun_cap} grows a plant in the back garden that {pronoun} has never identified. It predates {pronoun_pos} tenancy.
Someone has been asking around town about {pronoun_obj} specifically. Asking careful questions.
